summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Intelligence + Execution layer completed. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified with DEMO mode, eligibility cards with पात्र/अपात्र badges, PDF download, tool progress indicator, Hindi voice button, and blue double ticks.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/send-otp with phone returns success ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/send-otp rejects invalid phone (400) ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/verify-otp with otp=1234 returns user_id (24-char ObjectId) ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/verify-otp with wrong OTP returns failure ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/chat with 'namaste' triggers profiler asking name in Hindi ✓
BACKEND: Full profiler flow (namaste→name→age→income→state) works correctly ✓
BACKEND: Profile completion triggers eligibility chain + PDF generation ✓
BACKEND: Vidyasiri shows FIRST and eligible for income < 150000 + Karnataka ✓
BACKEND: Vidyasiri shows ineligible for income > 150000 ✓
BACKEND: Income compared as YEARLY (not monthly) ✓
BACKEND: bot_message has pdf_url, tool_progress array, eligibility_results on profile completion ✓
BACKEND: DEMO_MODE 'beta' trigger returns instant Vidyasiri eligible + PDF ✓
BACKEND: DEMO_MODE '10th' trigger returns instant result ✓
BACKEND: DEMO_MODE 'scholarship' trigger returns instant result ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/{id} returns valid PDF file (application/pdf, %PDF magic bytes) ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/invalid-id returns 404 ✓
BACKEND: POST /api/search-schemes returns Document scanned format ✓
BACKEND: GET /api/schemes returns 3 seeded schemes (Awas, Vidyasiri, Vidya Lakshmi) ✓
FRONTEND: Login page loads, accepts phone + OTP 1234 ✓
FRONTEND: Chat page shows profiler questions in Hindi ✓
FRONTEND: ToolProgressIndicator streaming bullets visible during loading ✓
FRONTEND: Eligibility cards with पात्र/अपात्र badges displayed ✓
FRONTEND: PDF download button with correct URL format (/api/pdf/{id}) ✓
FRONTEND: Hindi voice button visible on bot messages ✓
FRONTEND: Blue double ticks on user messages ✓
FRONTEND: MCP tool trace showing documents scanned ✓
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Prisma ORM with MongoDB replica set working correctly
Income field stored and compared as YEARLY (saalana aay)
Vidyasiri eligibility limit correctly set at 1.5 lakh/year (150000)
PDF generation with ReportLab working correctly
Tool progress steps showing Hindi text correctly
Eligibility cards displaying पात्र (eligible) and अपात्र (ineligible) badges
seed_data_creation: Tests use timestamp-based phone numbers to create fresh users each run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified Intelligence + Execution layer (search_schemes, eligibilityMatcher, generateFilledForm). Backend tests cover auth, profiler flow (name→age→income→state), DEMO_MODE triggers, eligibility rules (income YEARLY, Vidyasiri <150k + Karnataka), PDF download. Frontend verified: login, chat with Hindi questions, tool progress indicator, eligibility cards (पात्र/अपात्र), PDF download button, Hindi voice button, blue ticks, MCP tool trace.
